decision.archive_summary: Earlier block: implementation progress on the 'user-perceived context' improvements was reported, then a short validation thread covered how to verify in Codex and whether the assistant had already tested it. Current active topic shifted to UX for visible context-size monitoring inside Codex: the user cannot judge improvements without seeing context size, wants a direct status-bar-triggered display that updates continuously without manual commands, and accepts an editor/terminal/tail-style auto-updating view. The assistant said repo-side visualization surfaces already exist and can be hooked up.
decision.reasoning_summary: This is the same active topic, so relation=continue. The latest user '需要' is an acceptance/continuation of the still-open implementation request from t8-t11, especially the concrete UX requirements in t10 and the assistant's proposed display surfaces in t11. The earlier implementation-status and validation exchanges in t1-t7 are no longer needed as raw prompt context because they are resolved and off the critical path.
